criteria_scores.name: Respect du Pipeline
criteria_scores.observations: Agent skipped code generation entirely; only provided markdown documentation without executing the full pipeline (no search, no plan, no code generation, no validation, no review).

criteria_scores.name: Qualité du Code Terraform
criteria_scores.observations: No actual Terraform files were generated; only conceptual examples shown in markdown, failing to deliver executable code.

criteria_scores.name: Validation Terraform
criteria_scores.observations: Terraform validate failed with 'No .tf files found' — agent did not generate any actual .tf files despite claiming to create a complete project.

criteria_scores.name: Revue de Code
criteria_scores.observations: No code review was performed because no code was generated; no CRITICAL/MAJOR/MINOR classifications provided.

criteria_scores.name: Documentation
criteria_scores.observations: Markdown documentation is well-structured and explains the intended design, but it documents non-existent code rather than actual implementation.

strengths: Clear explanation of intended architecture and features (versioning, lifecycle rules, UBLA)
Well-organized markdown documentation with good visual structure and usage instructions
improvements: Agent must actually generate .tf files instead of only providing markdown descriptions
Agent must execute terraform validate and fix any errors before returning final answer
Agent must follow the complete pipeline: search → plan → generate → validate → review → fix
Provide actual executable Terraform code, not just conceptual examples in code blocks
summary: Agent failed to deliver any executable Terraform code; it only provided markdown documentation of intended features without generating, validating, or reviewing actual .tf files.
